reviews.comment:
Es un paso obligado para recargar combustible sobre que va a realizar un viaje largo.
Los precios no sabría decir, porque varían constantemente.
Tiene un lugar grande para comer, pero es un comedor privado no un Full.
Hay baños limpios y lugar para estacionar.
Acepta efectivo y tarjeta de crédito.
Los socios del Automóvil Club Argentino tienen descuento.

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-stop for refueling if you're going on a long trip.
I couldn't tell you the prices, because they fluctuate constantly.
It has a large dining area, but it's a private dining room, not a full-service station.
There are clean restrooms and parking. They accept cash and credit cards. Members of the Argentine Automobile Club get a discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1ak9hdC1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
